subcodes.first_line: In this day the True One, exalted be His glory, is seated upon the Most Great Throne, and all atoms from every direction proclaim "The Lord is come!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز حق جل جلاله بر عرش اعظم مستوی و جمیع ذرات از کل جهات بقد اتی مالک
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @the power of words; of speech, @call to action
